contentBlocks.original:
प्रणम्य शिरसा देवं गौरीपुत्र विनायकम् ।
भक्तावासं स्मरेन्नित्यायुष्कामार्थसिद्धये ॥१॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
praṇamya śirasā devaṃ gaurīputra vināyakam .
bhaktāvāsaṃ smarennityāyuṣkāmārthasiddhaye ..1..
contentBlocks.translation: The learned one, who wishes, for more life, wealth and love, should salute with his head, Lord Ganapathi who is the son of Goddess Parvathi
contentBlocks.meanings: प्रणम्य (praṇamya) – having saluted; शिरसा (śirasā) – with the head; देवं (devaṃ) – the god; गौरीपुत्र (gaurīputra) – son of Gauri (gaurī:Gauri | putra:son); विनायकम् (vināyakam) – Vinayaka; भक्तावासं (bhaktāvāsaṃ) – abode of devotees (bhakta:devotee | āvāsaṃ:abode); स्मरेत् (smaret) – should remember; नित्य (nitya) – always; आयुष्कामार्थसिद्धये (āyuṣkāmārthasiddhaye) – for life, wealth, and love (āyuḥ:life | kāma:desire/love | artha:wealth | siddhaye:for attainment);

contentBlocks.original:
प्रथमं वक्रतुण्डं च एकदन्तं द्वितीयकम् ।
तृतीयं कृष्णपिङ्गाक्षं गजवक्त्रं चतुर्थकम् ॥२॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
prathamaṃ vakratuṇḍaṃ ca ekadantaṃ dvitīyakam .
tṛtīyaṃ kṛṣṇapiṅgākṣaṃ gajavaktraṃ caturthakam ..2..
contentBlocks.translation: Think of him first as god with broken tusk, second as the god with one tusk, third as the one with reddish black eyes, fourth as the one who has the face of an elephant
contentBlocks.meanings: प्रथमं (prathamaṃ) – first; वक्रतुण्डं (vakratuṇḍaṃ) – with broken tusk (vakra:broken | tuṇḍaṃ:tusk); च (ca) – and; एकदन्तं (ekadantaṃ) – with one tusk (eka:one | dantaṃ:tusk); द्वितीयकम् (dvitīyakam) – second; तृतीयं (tṛtīyaṃ) – third; कृष्णपिङ्गाक्षं (kṛṣṇapiṅgākṣaṃ) – reddish black eyes (kṛṣṇa:black | piṅga:reddish | akṣaṃ:eyes); गजवक्त्रं (gajavaktraṃ) – elephant face (gaja:elephant | vaktraṃ:face); चतुर्थकम् (caturthakam) – fourth;

contentBlocks.original:
लम्बोदरं पञ्चमं च षष्ठं विकटमेव च ।
सप्तमं विघ्नराजं च धूम्रवर्ण तथाष्टमम् ॥३॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
lambodaraṃ pañcamaṃ ca ṣaṣṭhaṃ vikaṭameva ca .
saptamaṃ vighnarājaṃ ca dhūmravarṇa tathāṣṭamam ..3..
contentBlocks.translation: Fifth as the one who has a very broad paunch, sixth as the one who is cruel to his enemies, seventh as the one who is remover of obstacles, eighth as the one who is of the colour of smoke.
contentBlocks.meanings: लम्बोदरं (lambodaraṃ) – broad paunch (lamba:broad | udaraṃ:paunch); पञ्चमं (pañcamaṃ) – fifth; च (ca) – and; षष्ठं (ṣaṣṭhaṃ) – sixth; विकटम् (vikaṭam) – cruel; एव (eva) – indeed; च (ca) – and; सप्तमं (saptamaṃ) – seventh; विघ्नराजं (vighnarājaṃ) – remover of obstacles (vighna:obstacle | rājaṃ:king); च (ca) – and; धूम्रवर्ण (dhūmravarṇa) – colour of smoke (dhūmra:smoke | varṇa:colour); तथा (tathā) – thus; अष्टमम् (aṣṭamam) – eighth;

contentBlocks.original:
नवमं भालचन्द्रं च दशमं तु विनायकम् ।
एकादशं गणपतिं द्वादशं तु गजाननम् ॥४॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
navamaṃ bhālacandraṃ ca daśamaṃ tu vināyakam .
ekādaśaṃ gaṇapatiṃ dvādaśaṃ tu gajānanam ..4..
contentBlocks.translation: Ninth as the one who crescent in his forehead, tenth as the one, who is the leader of remover of obstacles, eleventh as the leader of the army of Lord Shiva, and twelfth as the one who has the face of an elephant.
contentBlocks.meanings: नवमं (navamaṃ) – ninth; भालचन्द्रं (bhālacandraṃ) – crescent moon on forehead (bhāla:forehead | candraṃ:moon); च (ca) – and; दशमं (daśamaṃ) – tenth; तु (tu) – but; विनायकम् (vināyakam) – remover of obstacles; एकादशं (ekādaśaṃ) – eleventh; गणपतिं (gaṇapatiṃ) – leader of Shiva's army; द्वादशं (dvādaśaṃ) – twelfth; तु (tu) – but; गजाननम् (gajānanam) – elephant-faced (gaja:elephant | ānana:face);

contentBlocks.original:
द्वादशैतानि नामानि त्रिसन्ध्यं यः पठेन्नरः ।
न च विघ्नभयं तस्य सर्वसिद्धिश्च जायते ॥५॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
dvādaśaitāni nāmāni trisandhyaṃ yaḥ paṭhennaraḥ .
na ca vighnabhayaṃ tasya sarvasiddhiśca jāyate ..5..
contentBlocks.translation: Any one reading these twelve names, at dawn, noon and dusk, will never have fear of defeat, and would always achieve whatever he wants.
contentBlocks.meanings: द्वादश (dvādaśa) – twelve; एतानि (etāni) – these; नामानि (nāmāni) – names; त्रिसन्ध्यम् (trisandhyam) – at dawn, noon, dusk (tri:three | sandhyam:junctions (times)); यः (yaḥ) – who; पठेत् (paṭhet) – reads; नरः (naraḥ) – man; न (na) – not; च (ca) – and; विघ्नभयम् (vighnabhayam) – fear of obstacles (vighna:obstacle | bhayam:fear); तस्य (tasya) – his; सर्वसिद्धिः (sarvasiddhiḥ) – all achievements (sarva:all | siddhiḥ:achievements); च (ca) – and; जायते (jāyate) – arises;

contentBlocks.original:
विद्यार्थी लभते विद्यां धनार्थी लभते धनम् ।
पुत्रार्थी लभते पुत्रान्मोक्षार्थी लभते गतिम् ॥६॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
vidyārthī labhate vidyāṃ dhanārthī labhate dhanam .
putrārthī labhate putrānmokṣārthī labhate gatim ..6..
contentBlocks.translation: One who pursues education will get knowledge, one who wants to earn money will get money, one who wishes for a son, will get a son, and one who wants salvation will get salvation.
contentBlocks.meanings: विद्यार्थी (vidyārthī) – seeker of knowledge (vidyā:knowledge | arthī:seeker); लभते (labhate) – obtains; विद्यां (vidyāṃ) – knowledge; धनार्थी (dhanārthī) – seeker of wealth (dhana:wealth | arthī:seeker); लभते (labhate) – obtains; धनम् (dhanam) – wealth; पुत्रार्थी (putrārthī) – seeker of a son (putra:son | arthī:seeker); लभते (labhate) – obtains; पुत्रान् (putrān) – sons; मोक्षार्थी (mokṣārthī) – seeker of liberation (mokṣa:liberation | arthī:seeker); लभते (labhate) – obtains; गतिम् (gatim) – salvation;

contentBlocks.original:
जपेद् गणपतिस्तोत्रं षड्भिर्मासैः फलं लभेत् ।
संवत्सरेण सिद्धिं च लभते नात्र संशयः ॥७॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
japed gaṇapatistotraṃ ṣaḍbhirmāsaiḥ phalaṃ labhet .
saṃvatsareṇa siddhiṃ ca labhate nātra saṃśayaḥ ..7..
contentBlocks.translation: Results of chanting this prayer, of Ganapati will be got within six months, and within a year, he would get all wishes fulfilled, and there is no doubt about this.
contentBlocks.meanings: जपेत् (japet) – should chant; गणपतिस्तोत्रं (gaṇapatistotraṃ) – Ganapati hymn (gaṇapati:Ganapati | stotraṃ:hymn); षड्भिः (ṣaḍbhiḥ) – with six; मासैः (māsaiḥ) – months; फलं (phalaṃ) – result; लभेत् (labhet) – would obtain; संवत्सरेण (saṃvatsareṇa) – within a year; सिद्धिं (siddhiṃ) – fulfillment; च (ca) – and; लभते (labhate) – obtains; न (na) – no; अत्र (atra) – here; संशयः (saṃśayaḥ) – doubt;

contentBlocks.original:
अष्टाभ्यो ब्राह्मणेभ्यश्च लिखित्वा यः समर्पयेत् ।
तस्य विद्या भवेत्सर्वा गणेशस्य प्रसादतः ॥८॥
contentBlocks.transliteration:
aṣṭābhyo brāhmaṇebhyaśca likhitvā yaḥ samarpayet .
tasya vidyā bhavetsarvā gaṇeśasya prasādataḥ ..8..
contentBlocks.translation: One who gets this prayer, written by eight brahmanas, and offers it to Lord Ganesha, will become knowledgeable, and would be blessed with all stellar qualities, by the grace of Lord Ganesha.
contentBlocks.meanings: अष्टाभ्यः (aṣṭābhyaḥ) – to eight; ब्राह्मणेभ्यः (brāhmaṇebhyaḥ) – to the brahmanas; च (ca) – and; लिखित्वा (likhitvā) – having written; यः (yaḥ) – who; समर्पयेत् (samarpayet) – offers; तस्य (tasya) – his; विद्या (vidyā) – knowledge; भवेत् (bhavet) – becomes; सर्वा (sarvā) – all; गणेशस्य (gaṇeśasya) – of Ganesha; प्रसादतः (prasādataḥ) – by the grace;
